PATIENT_ID: TEST_CAUTI_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-01-15 09:00:00
Foley catheter inserted in ED.
Indwelling urinary catheter in place, draining clear yellow urine.

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-01-17 08:00:00
Foley catheter in place since admission day 1. Catheter day 3.

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-01-18 10:00:00
Patient developed fever, temperature 38.6 C.
Suprapubic tenderness on exam.
Urine cloudy. Suspected catheter-associated UTI.
Onset of symptoms after arrival to hospital.

[LAB] 2026-01-18 11:00:00
Urine culture positive for E. coli.
100,000 CFU per mL. Single organism identified.
